generation_method: Construct all 54 scenario/receiver/replicate pairing keys; sort pair blocks by SHA-256 of fixed_salt + '|' + pairing_key; keep each pair adjacent; alternate H0-first and H1-first by pair-block ordinal.
non_claims: The fixed order does not prove receiver independence or eliminate temporal provider drift.
A listed unit is planned configuration, not evidence that execution occurred.
No baseline unit is authorized until the corpus freeze and signed release anchor are complete.
